_doc: Hand-curated fixtures for the vision-LLM ingest spike (T32). Three sections per document: (a) `verify_anchors` — 10 phrases of ≥6 words each, used with gander.verify.verify_quote for Gate 1 (anchor-survival ≥9/10); (b) `column_tokens` — short sidebar+body tokens for Gate 2 (column-order detector); (c) `cz_only_tokens` — CZ-language phrases that must appear literally (not translated) for Gate 3 (translation-drift detector).

_gates.gate2_column_order: all sidebar tokens appear before all body tokens (multi-column doc only)
_gates.gate3_translation_drift: every cz_only_token appears literally in transcript — no EN translation

profile_pdf._layout: multi-column LinkedIn export, dark sidebar + body, CZ+EN bilingual, 3 pages

verify_anchors.text: Senior Data Scientist with 10 years of experience in Czech banking and insurance
Leads a 4-person Data Science team owning the SME credit-risk scorecard programme
Migrated the legacy logistic scorecard to a LightGBM 3.3 stack with SHAP explanations
retaining model interpretability for the CNB regulator while lifting AUC from 0.72 to 0.79
Built the survival-analysis model for early-warning signals on the SME portfolio
flagging at-risk accounts 38 days earlier on average than the previous rules-based
Owns the model-documentation template the risk-management team submits to the regulator
Built the motor-insurance pricing model (GLM + GBM ensemble, scikit-learn 0.24) for the
Czech retail book; improved combined ratio by 2.1 pp over the prior pricing engine
Built the fraud-detection rule-mining tooling on top of PostgreSQL; flagged a recurring

verify_anchors.text: Data Scientist with 5 years of mid-level experience across Czech e-commerce and search
Owns end-to-end model lifecycle from problem framing to monitoring
Led the customer churn model retraining for Mall.cz, reducing 30-day churn by 11%
loyalty-program cohort via a re-targeted email-frequency policy
Built the basket-level demand-forecasting model for the grocery vertical
cutting forecast MAPE on top-200 SKUs from 24% to 17%
Owned the click-prediction model for the Zboží.cz product feed
Lifted top-3 CTR by 6.8% in a 30-day A/B against the previous logistic baseline
Built the spam-classifier evaluation harness for the Email.cz inbox-zero feature
labelling drift in the held-out set that the senior team had been chasing for two sprints
